## JournalBaseId type

Journal identifier within a single collection Format: YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS-xxxxxxxx (e.g., "2026-01-15-143025-a1b2c3d4")

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type JournalBaseId = Brand<string, 'JournalBaseId'>;
```
